## Validation

<!-- List automated checks and any manual Mirage GOTV validation. Never attach a private demo. -->

- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test:unit`
- [ ] `npm run parser:verify`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`

## Privacy, security, and provenance

- [ ] Demo bytes and parsed match data remain local; no new telemetry, upload, or persistence was introduced.
- [ ] Demo-derived strings are treated as untrusted input.
- [ ] No private `.dem` or unredacted match data is included in commits, issues, or artifacts.
- [ ] New third-party code/assets have immutable source commits, licenses, local paths, and SHA-256 hashes in `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md`.
- [ ] Parser artifact metadata and hashes were updated when parser output changed.
